- `func StripSentinel(err error) string`
- `func SyncOperation(id, description string, metadata, result proto.Message) (*operationpb.Operation, error)`
- `func WithOrgID(ctx context.Context, id domain.OrganizationID) context.Context`
- `func WrapPgErr(err error, kindHint, idHint string) error`
- `func Wrapf(sentinel error, format string, args ...any) error`

    ctx context.Context,
    fga clients.OpenFGAClient,
    logger *slog.Logger,
    parentType, parentID, relation, childType, childID string,
)`
